variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 5177 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 5177 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 5177 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter LC 5005 x Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 5177
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.

variants.title: Fleetguard CV50840 Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 5177
variants.description: Fleetguard® CV50840 crankcase ventilation unit features patented technologies that control oil drip and emissions with the highest oil and particle removal efficiency available.
